title: The graveyard economy: how solo devs are selling apps they can no longer maintain
summary: Long-form analysis of the growing market for abandoned apps. Author interviewed 14 solo developers who sold their apps. Average sale price: $3,200. Most said they would have accepted less if someone had reached out earlier. Key insight: 90% of sellers preferred direct outreach over brokers.
